meta.title: StudAI — AI math tutor
meta.description: A calm, patient AI math tutor that teaches at your own pace.

auth.title: Sign in to continue
auth.description: Early access to the AI math tutor prototype.

status.accountCreated: Account created. Check your email to confirm it.

sessions.title: Sessions
sessions.description: Your past conversations with the AI tutor will appear here.
sessions.createError: Could not create a new session.
sessions.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this session? The conversation will be lost.

chat.placeholder: Type a message... (Enter to send, Shift+Enter for new line)

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Your display name — this is how the AI tutor will address you.

footer.soon: StudAI will soon do more — sessions, settings, and a calm, patient AI math tutor.
